scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.test:services: concurrently "cd services/auth-service && npm test" "cd services/payment-service && npm test" "cd services/notification-service && npm test" "cd services/user-service && npm test"
scripts.setup: npm run db:init && npm run install:all
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd app && npm install && cd ../services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install
